question: Describe the sequence of actions Evan performs to reveal the hidden panel in the master bedroom and the features of the space that make the townhouse unusual.
answer: Evan first waits for Meg to notice the oddly angled mirrors near the closet entrance in the master bedroom. When she points out something seems off, he presses the top of the wall mirror, causing it to click and open partially before swinging fully open to reveal a hidden panel. He then presses the top and bottom of the panel, each producing a click, and pulls it open to expose a narrow space behind. The townhouse has several unusual features, including a large amount of space for the price and a working cage-style elevator, which is rare in brownstones and was installed for the previous owner, who was disabled.
related_context: Evan smiles, admitting he was waiting for her to notice. He presses the top of the wall mirror, which clicks and opens a few inches. He swings it fully open, revealing a hidden panel in the wall. He presses again at the top and bottom of the panel, each time producing a click. The panel pulls open, revealing a narrow space behind. He points out the unusual features—the large amount of space for the price, the working cage-style elevator installed for the previous owner, who was disabled. He notes that such elevators are rare in brownstones.
